title: costularia elongata
intro: Costularia elongata, also known as the forest feather fern, is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Costularia elongata include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Costularia elongata is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
